items.title: Rough shotmaking start for both teams — Knicks just 10-for-22 on 2-pointers and 4-for-15 on 3s; Spurs just 7-for-17 from 2, 5-for-18 from 3. Spurs are +8 from FT line, and that’s the difference so far.
